name: llm-app
description: LLM application engineering: eval harnesses and regression gates (evaluate, don't eyeball), RAG pipelines (chunking, embeddings, retrieval quality + re-ranking, grounding and citation), prompt versioning, prompt-injection defense, token-cost control, and context management — a firing llm-app skill and a /llm-app:review command. Defers provider API specifics to the claude-api skill.
